_comment: Curated alternate-title map for the 0-result fallback search (EASYNEWS_FALLBACK_ALT_TITLES). Canonical/queried title -> list of alternate names releases are actually posted under. Matching is case-insensitive, direct + substring (either direction). Same format as upstream easynews-plus-plus custom-titles.json. Edit freely; keys beginning with an underscore (like this one) are ignored.
